Notice Of Hearing And Motion By Plaintiff To Have Matters Deemed Admitted; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Index; Declaration Of Ilia Borisov And Exhibits; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,100.00 Against Defendant And Their Counsel
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JORGE PEREZ ENRIQUEZ's Motion By Plaintiff To Have Matters Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,100.00 Against Defendant And Their Counsel.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to have matters deemed admitted, for requests for admissions, set one, is granted. Sanctions in the amount of $1,050 are awarded.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the courts's ruling.

Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/CK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant The City And County Of San Francisco'S Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Without Objections; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,100.00 Against Defendant And Defendant'S Counsel; And Declaration Of Ilia Borisov In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JORGE PEREZ ENRIQUEZ's Motion To Compel Defendant The City And County Of San Francisco'S Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, Without Objections; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,100.00 Against Defendant And Defendant'S Counsel.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to compel Defendant the City and County of San Francisco's responses to form interrogatories, set one, is granted. Sanctions in the amount of $1,050 are awarded.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/CK)

Motion To Compel Defendant He City And County Of San
Franciscos Responses To Equest For Production Of
Documents, Set One, Without Objections; Memorandum Of
Points And Authorities; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,100.00 Against Defendant And Defendants Counsel; And Declaration Of Ilia Borisov In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF JORGE PEREZ ENRIQUEZ's Motion To Compel Defendant The City And County Of San Franciscos Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, Without Objections; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2,100.00 Against Defendant And Defendants Counsel.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to compel Defendant the City and County of San Francisco's responses to request for production of documents, set one, is granted. Sanctions in the amount of $1,050 are awarded.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling with a cover letter stating compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/CK)
